headline: Everything your business needs online
subheadline: One simple subscription covers everything — from design to hosting.

items.title: Custom Website Design
items.description: A unique, modern website designed specifically for your business and brand identity.

items.title: Hosting Included
items.description: Your site lives on fast, reliable infrastructure. No extra costs, no server management.

items.title: Mobile-First
items.description: Your website looks perfect on every device — phone, tablet, or desktop.

items.title: SEO-Ready
items.description: Built with proper structure so search engines can find your business from day one.

items.title: Lightning Fast
items.description: Optimized for speed. Fast websites rank better and convert more visitors into customers.

items.title: Ongoing Support
items.description: We keep your site secure and running. Updates included in Growth and Priority plans.
